title: Contemporary Villa — Raidurg
overview: A full-home turnkey programme for a premium villa — layered living spaces, bespoke joinery, and white-glove handover across 12,400 sq ft.
brief: The client sought a contemporary family home that reads calm and collected on first arrival — generous daylight, clear circulation between formal and private zones, and finishes that withstand daily use without losing a premium feel.
approach: We anchored the palette on warm neutrals, brushed brass, and honed stone, resolving junctions in joinery before civil works began. Lighting was layered by scene — morning task, evening entertaining, and quiet night modes — with AV and storage integrated into millwork rather than added as afterthoughts.
materials: Honed Italian marble in formal areas
Brushed brass accents at touch points

execution.details: Phased delivery across three floors with daily site leadership, vendor QC, and documented snag close-out.

outcome.summary: Delivered on programme with a single accountable desk from concept through snag-free handover — all three floors signed off in one coordinated close-out.

processStrip.label: Concept
processStrip.alt: Villa Raidurg — concept mood and material palette

processStrip.label: Site
processStrip.alt: Villa Raidurg — joinery and finishes in progress

testimonial.quote: Vencore translated our brief into a villa that feels both contemporary and deeply personal — every junction, material, and detail was resolved before a single wall went up.
testimonial.name: Rajesh
